name: deckterm
description: Web-based terminal with PTY support, tiling window manager, and mobile-friendly UI

scripts.test:e2e:smoke: cd tests && PW_BASE_URL=${PW_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4174} npx playwright test reconnect-tab-status.spec.ts mobile-regressions.spec.ts phase3-clipboard.spec.ts --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:workspace: cd tests && PW_BASE_URL=${PW_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4174} npx playwright test workspace-signals.spec.ts --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:navigation: cd tests && PW_BASE_URL=${PW_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4174} npx playwright test command-palette.spec.ts --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:navigation-surface: cd tests && PW_BASE_URL=${PW_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4174} npx playwright test navigation-surface.spec.ts --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
